case_title: CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR VS. OMAR KHALIF

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHALIF, OMAR AKA DUKE, DARRYL $1,875.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,935.94, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,925.00 FILED BY CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT KHALIF, OMAR AKA DUKE, DARRYL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $60.94) SERVED MAY-04-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KHALIF, OMAR AKA DUKE, DARRYL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-01-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
